trigger.description: An index publish lock is held while index vacuum previews reclaimable files.
setup_commands: ee diag advisory-lock --workspace . --resource-type index --holder j6-index-lock-holder --ttl-seconds 3600 --reason 'j6 index lock fixture' --json

expected_emission.repair_contains: Wait for the active index operation
expected_emission.repair_string: Wait for the active index operation to finish, then retry ee index vacuum --workspace . --json.
